name: Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds lean beef, cut into bite-sized pieces
5 medium potatoes, peeled and cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Slowly brown the onions in butter until very brown.
2. Remove from frying pan and add to soup kettle or Dutch oven.
3. Roll beef pieces in flour and pepper, then quickly brown in butter in frying pan.
4. Add a little water to frying pan to absorb the browned flour and pour into meat mixture.
5. Add carrots, celery, beef broth, and bay leaves to kettle.
6. Simmer for about 1 hour.
7. Add potatoes and continue simmering until done.
8. If desired, thicken with flour.
9. Add salt and pepper to taste.
10. Remove bay leaves.
